name: GH_DigitAlign
summary: Enumerates the possible alignments for digits inside the GH_DigitScroller control.

enum_values.name: Justify
enum_values.summary: Digits expand to fill out the entire free space.

enum_values.name: Left
enum_values.summary: Digits are stacked against the left side of the control.

enum_values.name: Center
enum_values.summary: Digits are stacked together in the center of the control.

enum_values.name: Right
enum_values.summary: Digits are stacked against the right side of the control.
